overview.description: The iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF aims to track bitcoin's performance while generating premium income through an actively managed options strategy. The fund provides investors a way to seek monthly income and capture a significant portion of bitcoin's upside potential, with potentially lower volatility compared to direct spot bitcoin exposure.
